title: Straight Washing Machine Valve – Brass Isolation Valve 15mm x 3/4 Inch for Hot & Cold Water Supply – Compact Appliance Plumbing Fitting for Washing Machines & Dishwashers
features: Straight washing machine isolation valve – PlumbEZ brass straight valve provides a secure, leak-resistant connection for washing machines, dishwashers and appliances in hot and cold water supply lines.
15 mm x 3/4″ fitting – Designed for direct, in-line installation on standard UK copper or barrier pipework with a 3/4 inch BSP outlet for flexible hose connections.
Durable brass construction – Built for long service life; resistant to leaks, corrosion and wear, making it a reliable plumbing fitting for domestic kitchens and utility rooms.
Quick & easy installation – Compact straight design fits neatly behind appliances, under sinks or in utility cupboards; ideal for both professional plumbers and DIY homeowners.
Essential plumbing accessory – Provides isolation for servicing or replacing appliances without shutting off the entire household water supply.
description: The PlumbEZ Straight Washing Machine Valve is a durable, compact plumbing fitting that ensures a reliable connection between your household appliances and the water supply. Designed with a 15 mm compression inlet and 3/4″ BSP threaded outlet, it provides a secure link to washing machine and dishwasher hoses while allowing for straightforward in-line installation on standard UK copper or barrier pipework. Made from solid brass, this straight isolation valve offers excellent resistance to corrosion, leaks and wear, ensuring long service life in domestic plumbing systems. Its slimline design makes it easy to fit neatly behind appliances, under sinks or within utility cupboards, saving space without compromising performance. The valve’s isolation function allows you to cut off the water supply to a specific appliance for servicing or replacement, without needing to shut down the entire household system. This makes it an essential plumbing accessory for both professional installers and DIY homeowners. Whether you are fitting a new washing machine, upgrading an old valve, or installing a dishwasher in your kitchen or utility room, the PlumbEZ Straight Washing Machine Valve delivers a leak-resistant, easy-to-install solution that helps keep your home plumbing safe, practical and efficient.
